passes.title: The Aviation Museum Of New Hampshire
passes.benefit_text:
Each pass provides free admission for up to 6 on Boston By Foot's public walking tours.
Please consult www.bostonbyfoot.org for tour details; pre-registration is required for all tours.
Reserve this pass to receive discount code. Not valid on private tours, water-based tours, or the two annual celebration tours (Beacon Hill with a BOO! & Footloose on the Freedom Trail.)
Currently there is no coupon to pick up for Boston by Foot.
source_phrases: Each pass provides free admission for up to 6 on Boston By Foot's public walking tours.
Please consult www.bostonbyfoot.org for tour details; pre-registration is required for all tours.
Reserve this pass to receive discount code. Not valid on private tours, water-based tours, or the two annual celebration tours (Beacon Hill with a BOO! & Footloose on the Freedom Trail.)
Currently there is no coupon to pick up for Boston by Foot.

passes.title: Boston By Foot
passes.benefit_text:
Admits up to 4 (adults or children) at half price per person.
This is an e-ticket, valid only for one day. You can either print it out and take it with you or display the pass on your phone or device. Either way, please be sure that the pass barcode is visible.
source_phrases: Admits up to 4 (adults or children) at half price per person.
This is an e-ticket, valid only for one day. You can either print it out and take it with you or display the pass on your phone or device. Either way, please be sure that the pass barcode is visible.

passes.title: Boston Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Paper pass grants one free admission.
You do not need to purchase tickets ahead of time or make a reservation unless you have 15 or more people and ticket sales end at 3:30 PM.
source_phrases: Paper pass grants one free admission.
You do not need to purchase tickets ahead of time or make a reservation unless you have 15 or more people and ticket sales end at 3:30 PM.

passes.title: The Butterfly Place
passes.benefit_text:
This library sponsored pass admits up to three people at half price discount. Additional people in your party pay full price. 
Pass must be picked up at the library and returned by 10 AM the following morning.
source_phrases: This library sponsored pass admits up to three people at half price discount. Additional people in your party pay full price.
Pass must be picked up at the library and returned by 10 AM the following morning.

passes.title: The Discovery Museums
passes.benefit_text: Admits 2 people at $10.00 per person. Admission is free for children 18 and under.
source_phrases: Admits 2 people at $10.00 per person. Admission is free for children 18 and under.

passes.title: Institute Of Contemporary Art Boston
passes.benefit_text: This pass admits 4 visitors at $5 per person. Under 18 years admitted free. See website for latest hours, holidays and closings. Tickets are purchased online, but you must bring the library discounted pass with you.
source_phrases: This pass admits 4 visitors at $5 per person. Under 18 years admitted free. See website for latest hours, holidays and closings. Tickets are purchased online, but you must bring the library discounted pass with you.

passes.title: Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum
passes.benefit_text:
This pass allows free parking for one vehicle.
Day Pass must be picked up at the library and returned by 10am the following morning.
source_phrases: This pass allows free parking for one vehicle.
Day Pass must be picked up at the library and returned by 10am the following morning.

passes.title: Massachusetts State Parks Department Of Conservation And Recreation
passes.benefit_text:
Pass admits 2 people. Admission is $10 per person.
NOTE: This is a virtual pass with a promo code that does not need to be picked up from the library.
source_phrases: Pass admits 2 people. Admission is $10 per person.
NOTE: This is a virtual pass with a promo code that does not need to be picked up from the library.

passes.title: Museum Of Fine Arts
passes.benefit_text:
This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum's Exhibit Halls.
Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free. Your library pass can only be used on the date printed on the pass.
IMPORTANT:
-Please bring your library pass confirmation (printed or displayed on a phone) when you visit. 
-When you arrive at the museum, stop at the box office to exchange your library pass and purchase your Exhibit Halls tickets at the discounted rate. If you have any questions, or would like to reserve your Exhibit Halls passes in advance to avoid waiting in line the day of your visit, please call 617-723-2500 (9:00 am - 5:00 pm daily).
source_phrases: This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum's Exhibit Halls.
Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free. Your library pass can only be used on the date printed on the pass.
IMPORTANT:
-Please bring your library pass confirmation (printed or displayed on a phone) when you visit.

-When you arrive at the museum, stop at the box office to exchange your library pass and purchase your Exhibit Halls tickets at the discounted rate. If you have any questions, or would like to reserve your Exhibit Halls passes in advance to avoid waiting in line the day of your visit, please call 617-723-2500 (9:00 am - 5:00 pm daily).

passes.title: Museum Of Science
passes.benefit_text:
Flint Memorial Libray ID/PASSCODE 41714)
This coupon allows 50% off admission to the New England Aquarium.
Only applies to adult and child pricing.
This is not a ticket.
Redeem this coupon in the General Admission line at the Aquarium’s ticket booth for discounted admission for up to 4 people.
Please visit neaq.org/coupons for details.
source_phrases: Flint Memorial Libray ID/PASSCODE 41714)
This coupon allows 50% off admission to the New England Aquarium.
Only applies to adult and child pricing.
This is not a ticket.
Redeem this coupon in the General Admission line at the Aquarium’s ticket booth for discounted admission for up to 4 people.
Please visit neaq.org/coupons for details.
Review the Aquarium’s website at www.neaq.org/safety ahead of your visit to ensure a safe and accessible experience.
Valid only for Aquarium admission.
This coupon does not provide any other discounts and cannot be applied to combo tickets.
Library coupons or tickets obtained with library coupons may not be sold.
Void if altered or copied. No cash value.

passes.title: New England Aquarium
passes.benefit_text:
Pass Type: Printable/Digital Coupon Pass (link delivered by email)
Admits up to 5 people at 50% off regular admission. Ages 12 months and under are free.
To obtain discounted admission in person at the museum please present either a printed pass or on a handheld device. Visit https://www.nschildrensmuseum.org/visit/buy-tickets/ for more information.
PASSES CANNOT BE USED ON SATURDAYS

PASSES CANNOT BE USED ON SATURDAYS

passes.title: North Shore Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text: Printable/Digital Coupon Pass. Each pass admits up to 2 patrons at $12 per person. You must use the promo code provided in the loan instructions to reserve your pass.
source_phrases: Printable/Digital Coupon Pass. Each pass admits up to 2 patrons at $12 per person. You must use the promo code provided in the loan instructions to reserve your pass.

passes.title: Peabody Essex Museum
passes.benefit_text:
The SANDMAGINATION discount code admits up to (6) Adults/Children at 50% off on a Wednesday, Thursday, Friday, or Sunday.
A discount code will be sent to your email address.
source_phrases: The SANDMAGINATION discount code admits up to (6) Adults/Children at 50% off on a Wednesday, Thursday, Friday, or Sunday.
A discount code will be sent to your email address.

passes.title: The Trustees Of The Reservations
passes.benefit_text:
One digital pass allows free admission for up to 5 people per day. 
No advance tickets or reservations are required for entry, and admission will be on a first come, first served basis.
source_phrases: One digital pass allows free admission for up to 5 people per day.
No advance tickets or reservations are required for entry, and admission will be on a first come, first served basis.

passes.title: The Uss Constitution Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Pass admits 6 people at $9.00 per adult and $6.00 per child. Pass is NOT accepted for ZooLights.
Your pass must be picked up at the library.
source_phrases: Pass admits 6 people at $9.00 per adult and $6.00 per child. Pass is NOT accepted for ZooLights.
Your pass must be picked up at the library.
